'''Orell''' was one of the yellow [[Star/Legends|suns]] located at the center of the [[Veron Minor system/Legends|Veron Minor system]] in the [[Mektrun Cluster/Legends|Mektrun Cluster]]. Along with its [[Binary star/Legends|twin]], [[Noveron]], Orell provided energy to all three [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the [[Star system/Legends|system]], [[Veron Minor|Veron]], [[Sileron]] and [[Trieron]].
